ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cookies" (
  "cookie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cookie */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the cookie */,
  "domain" TEXT /* Domain where the cookie is set */,
  "cat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cookie category */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Detailed purpose of the cookie */,
  "expiry" TEXT /* Expiry type (e.g., Persistent, Session) */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the cookie type */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cookie type */,
  "cookie_length" INTEGER /* Length of the cookie in days */,
  "consent_required" INTEGER /* Indicates whether user consent is required for the cookie */,
  "consent_given" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user has given consent for the cookie */,
  "last_consent_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last consent update */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the cookie (e.g., for tracking updates) */,
  "is_third_party" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the cookie is set by a third party */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cookie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookies_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES cookie_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookies_cat_id FOREIGN KEY ("cat_id") REFERENCES cookie_categories ("cat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cookie_categories" (
  "cat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cookie category */,
  "cat_name" TEXT /* Name of the cookie category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cookie category */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the category is a default category */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the category (for sorting and display) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cookie_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cookie type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the cookie type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cookie type */,
  "is_session_only" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the cookie is session-only */,
  "is_persistent" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the cookie is persistent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visits" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visit */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the visit */,
  "domain" TEXT /* Domain visited */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the visit */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the visit */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the visit */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID for the visit */,
  "traffic_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the traffic source for the visit */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for the visit (e.g., Desktop, Mobile, Tablet) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser */,
  "page_views" INTEGER /* Number of page views during the visit */,
  "clicks" INTEGER /* Number of clicks during the visit */,
  "referral_url" TEXT /* URL that referred the user to the site */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "geo_location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visits_traffic_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("traffic_source_id") REFERENCES traffic_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_visit" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's first visit */,
  "last_visit" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last visit */,
  "total_visits" INTEGER /* Total number of visits by the user */,
  "is_returning" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user is a returning visitor */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last purchase */,
  "total_purchases" INTEGER /* Total number of purchases made by the user */,
  "total_spend" TEXT /* Total amount spent by the user */,
  "loyalty_program" TEXT /* Name of the loyalty program the user is enrolled in */,
  "is_subscriber" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user is a subscriber (e.g., newsletter) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_cookies" (
  "user_cookie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-cookie relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "cookie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cookie */,
  "set_time" TEXT /* Time the cookie was set */,
  "expiry_time" TEXT /* Time the cookie will expire */,
  "consent_given" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user has given consent for the cookie */,
  "last_consent_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last consent update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_cookie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_cookies_cookie_id FOREIGN KEY ("cookie_id") REFERENCES cookies ("cookie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_cookies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visit_cookies" (
  "visit_cookie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visit-cookie relationship */,
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visit */,
  "cookie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cookie */,
  "set_time" TEXT /* Time the cookie was set during the visit */,
  "expiry_time" TEXT /* Time the cookie will expire */,
  "consent_given" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user has given consent for the cookie */,
  "last_consent_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last consent update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_cookie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visit_cookies_visit_id FOREIGN KEY ("visit_id") REFERENCES visits ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visit_cookies_cookie_id FOREIGN KEY ("cookie_id") REFERENCES cookies ("cookie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the traffic source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the traffic source */,
  "is_organic" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the traffic source is organic */,
  "is_paid" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the traffic source is paid */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the traffic source */,
  "campaign_id" TEXT /* ID of the marketing campaign associated with the traffic source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)
